install_prompts: Consumer agent follow-up: make sure the runtime that executes provider-status and provider fetches can import redis and ib_async. Low-pollution path: use uv run --with redis --with ib_async --with pandas for ad-hoc IBKR historical fetches.
Consumer agent follow-up: reuse the single reachable local IBKR API on port 4002 unless the user says otherwise.
